page_metadata.biotools__summary: MS Annika is a cross-linking search engine for use with cleavable cross-linkers and MS2 or MS2-MS3 spectra. It can deal with a wide variety of cleavable cross-linkers and provides robust and transparent FDR control based on a target-decoy approach. MS Annika is available free of charge as a plug-in for Proteome Discoverer.
